→ melee_spell attack: [d20:19+3=22 vs AC 16] HIT! 5casting_mod force damage. Thri-kreen — Iron Concentration HP: NaN/67

→ Thri-kreen — Iron Concentration: DEX save [d20:8+7=15 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 1 ══

→ Mage: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 3/5 targets affected.
